THE FUTURE OF TEXTILE

Our technology

WarmLife® and CoolLife® are patented fabric technologies designed for temperature regulation and sustainability. WarmLife uses a metallic nano-layer to reflect radiant body heat back to the skin, making it 30% warmer, lighter, and more packable than similar fabrics. CoolLife, made from sustainable polyethylene, is the world’s first infrared-transparent fabric that efficiently releases body heat for an instant and continuous cooling effect. Both are validated by lab and field tests and produced with global partners.

Achieving feather-light performance without actual feathers, WarmLife® offers ultra-packable, breathable insulation that efficiently redirects 100% of body heat back to the skin through nano-metallic coating technology while utilizing significantly less material.

+10°C

21℉ warmer than competitor products

  • 30% Lighter
  • 30% Less Material
Learn More

CoolLife® represents the world’s first thermally-transparent material for fabrics, providing continuous cooling performance surpassing all other materials. Maintaining a surface temperature lower than organic cotton, it achieves this while generating half the environmental impact of conventional materials.

-2°C

The World’s Only Continuous Cooling Textile Material

Instant Cooling Comfort

Continuous Effect

Permanent Never wears out

  • Lowest Environmental
  • Footprint of any Material
Learn More

Who We Are

LifeLabs, spun off from Stanford University, develops advanced textile technologies using two patented nanotech innovations: WarmLife® and CoolLife®. The technologies enable functional apparel to maintain comfort in extreme temperatures (-65°C to +45°C). With branches in North America, Europe, and China, LifeLabs supports brands with high-performance, sustainable materials and continues to drive eco-friendly textile innovation.
